instruction:
Repair the disturbed scenic SVG: enchanted glowing forest.

Patch:
- remove sv_024-extra-survey-marker
- download-sv_024-path-007.fill: "#22c55e" -> "#0d3a36"
- download-sv_024-ellipse-001.cx: 359.0 -> 300
- download-sv_024-path-006.stroke-width: 6.0 -> 2
- download-sv_024-rect-002.opacity: 0.1 -> 0.18
